description: Chiller CH-01 discharge pressure rose 15% over 48 hours. Are any connected AHUs or pumps showing correlated anomalies in the same period?
Three sensors on different equipment in Building-A triggered high-temperature alerts within 10 minutes. Are these assets connected through shared systems?
Vibration anomaly detected on Motor MTR-22. Check if any equipment that DEPENDS_ON or SHARES_SYSTEM_WITH MTR-22 has had anomalies in the last 7 days.
Condenser water flow dropped 20% on the east loop. Correlate sensor readings across all equipment on that loop to find the source.
Work order WO-8834 reports unusual noise from AHU-15. Find all equipment sharing the same mechanical room and check for concurrent anomalies.
Electrical power quality anomaly on feeder FDR-03. Identify all downstream equipment with simultaneous sensor deviations to confirm propagation path.
